Title: Cart Merge - Anonymous Then Register
Preconditions: Product available in stock; user is not yet registered; browsing store anonymously
Steps:
[NAV] navigate to {{FRONT_URL}} without signing in (guest session)
[ACT] add Product_1 to cart with qty=2
[ASSERT] verify cart badge shows 2
[ACT] navigate to registration page
[ACT] register a new account with valid credentials
[WAIT] wait for registration and auto-login to complete
[NAV] navigate to {{FRONT_URL}}/cart
[ASSERT] verify Product_1 present in cart with qty=2
[ASSERT] verify cart badge shows correct count
Assertions:
[STATE] guest cart items preserved after registration and auto-login
[DOM] Product_1 listed with qty=2 in cart
[STATE] cart badge reflects merged item count
[MATH] cart subtotal matches expected value for qty=2
Cross_Layer_Checks:
[API] mergeCarts or equivalent mutation response errors[] is empty
[CONSOLE] no JS errors during registration and cart merge
[NETWORK] no 4xx/5xx during merge
Failure_Signals: guest items lost after registration; cart empty for new account; qty mismatch after merge
Cleanup: Remove items from cart; delete test account if needed

Title: Cart Merge - No Duplicate SKUs
Preconditions: Same Product A exists in both anonymous cart and registered user cart; user currently signed out
Steps:
[NAV] log in to {{FRONT_URL}} as {{USER_EMAIL}}
[ACT] add Product A to cart with qty=2
[ACT] sign out
[NAV] navigate to {{FRONT_URL}} as guest
[ACT] add same Product A to cart with qty=1 as guest
[ACT] sign in with {{USER_EMAIL}}
[NAV] navigate to {{FRONT_URL}}/cart
[ASSERT] verify exactly one line item for Product A
[ASSERT] verify qty=3 (sum of 2+1)
[ASSERT] verify no duplicate line items
Assertions:
[STATE] single line item for Product A (no duplicates)
[DOM] quantity shows 3 (merged sum)
[MATH] line total = unit price x 3
[MATH] cart subtotal correct for merged quantity
Cross_Layer_Checks:
[API] mergeCarts mutation response errors[] is empty
[CONSOLE] no JS errors on sign-in and cart page
[NETWORK] no 4xx/5xx during merge
Failure_Signals: duplicate line items created for same SKU; qty not summed (shows 1 or 2 instead of 3); two separate entries in cart

Title: Cart Merge - Currency Mismatch
Preconditions: Store supports multiple currencies (USD and EUR); anonymous cart has products in USD; registered user default currency is EUR
Steps:
[NAV] navigate to {{FRONT_URL}} as guest with USD currency
[ACT] add products to cart in USD as anonymous user
[ASSERT] verify guest cart shows USD prices
[ACT] sign in as {{USER_EMAIL}} whose default currency is EUR
[WAIT] wait for cart merge and currency switch
[NAV] navigate to {{FRONT_URL}}/cart
[ASSERT] verify all products merged into single currency cart
[ASSERT] verify prices display in customer default currency (EUR)
[ASSERT] if product unavailable in EUR, verify warning message shown
Assertions:
[STATE] all products from both carts present after merge
[DOM] prices displayed in customer default currency (EUR)
[STATE] products without EUR price show warning 'This product is no longer available for purchase' or similar
[MATH] cart totals calculated in single currency
Cross_Layer_Checks:
[API] mergeCarts mutation response errors[] is empty
[CONSOLE] no JS errors during currency merge
[NETWORK] no 4xx/5xx
Failure_Signals: mixed currencies in merged cart; USD prices shown instead of EUR; products silently dropped without warning; cart totals in wrong currency

Title: Cart Merge - Persists After Logout and Re-login
Preconditions: Anonymous user adds products; user logs in (merge happens); merged cart established
Steps:
[NAV] navigate to {{FRONT_URL}} as guest
[ACT] add Product B to cart as guest
[ACT] sign in as {{USER_EMAIL}} (triggers merge)
[NAV] navigate to {{FRONT_URL}}/cart
[ASSERT] note merged cart contents (items, quantities, subtotal)
[ACT] sign out
[ACT] sign in again with {{USER_EMAIL}}
[NAV] navigate to {{FRONT_URL}}/cart
[ASSERT] verify merged cart persists with same items and quantities
[ASSERT] verify no items lost or duplicated after logout/login cycle
Assertions:
[STATE] merged cart contents identical after logout/re-login
[DOM] all items present with correct quantities
[MATH] cart subtotal matches pre-logout value
[STATE] no duplicate or missing items
Cross_Layer_Checks:
[API] getCart query returns same items after re-login
[CONSOLE] no JS errors
[NETWORK] no 4xx/5xx
Failure_Signals: merged items lost after logout; cart empty on re-login; items duplicated after re-login; subtotal mismatch

Title: Cart Merge - Different Product Types
Preconditions: Anonymous cart has simple products; registered user cart has configurable/variation products
Steps:
[NAV] log in to {{FRONT_URL}} as {{USER_EMAIL}}
[ACT] add a configurable product (with size/color variant selected) to cart
[ACT] sign out
[NAV] navigate to {{FRONT_URL}} as guest
[ACT] add a simple product to cart as guest
[ACT] sign in as {{USER_EMAIL}}
[NAV] navigate to {{FRONT_URL}}/cart
[ASSERT] verify both simple and configurable products present
[ASSERT] verify configurable product retains variant attributes (size, color)
[ASSERT] verify no missing or mismatched products
Assertions:
[STATE] simple product from guest cart present in merged cart
[STATE] configurable product from user cart present with correct variant attributes
[DOM] variant attributes (size, color) displayed correctly on configurable product
[STATE] no missing or mismatched products after merge
Cross_Layer_Checks:
[API] mergeCarts mutation response errors[] is empty
[CONSOLE] no JS errors
[NETWORK] no 4xx/5xx
Failure_Signals: configurable product loses variant attributes after merge; simple product missing; product types confused or swapped

Title: Cart Merge - Smart Merge Failure Handling
Preconditions: Products in USD cart; simulate merge failure scenario (e.g. network interruption during merge)
Steps:
[NAV] navigate to {{FRONT_URL}} as guest
[ACT] add products to USD cart as anonymous user
[ACT] sign in as {{USER_EMAIL}}
[WAIT] wait for merge attempt
[ASSERT] if merge fails, verify clear error message displayed
[ASSERT] verify original user cart remains unaffected (no data loss)
[ASSERT] verify user can retry or navigate to cart without crash
[NAV] navigate to {{FRONT_URL}}/cart
[ASSERT] verify cart is in a consistent state (either merged or pre-merge user cart intact)
Assertions:
[DOM] clear error message displayed if merge fails (not a blank page or 500)
[STATE] user cart data not corrupted by failed merge
[STATE] cart page accessible and functional after merge failure
[STATE] user can continue shopping or retry
Cross_Layer_Checks:
[API] merge failure returns informative error (not 500)
[CONSOLE] no unhandled JS exceptions
[NETWORK] no cascading failures after merge error
Failure_Signals: page crashes on merge failure; cart data corrupted; no error message shown; user stuck on broken page; cart inaccessible after failed merge

Title: Cart Merge Selection - Empty Cart + Selected All (ON)
Preconditions: Default 'Selected for checkout' = ON in store settings; Cart1 (user) is empty; Cart2 (guest) has items with all selected
Steps:
[NAV] log in to {{FRONT_URL}} and ensure cart is empty
[ACT] sign out
[NAV] navigate to {{FRONT_URL}} as guest
[ACT] add 2-3 products to cart as guest (all auto-selected for checkout)
[ACT] sign in as {{USER_EMAIL}}
[NAV] navigate to {{FRONT_URL}}/cart
[ASSERT] verify all guest items present in merged cart
[ASSERT] verify all items have 'selected for checkout' state = ON
[ASSERT] verify Proceed to Checkout button active
Assertions:
[STATE] all guest items merged into user cart
[DOM] all item checkboxes checked (selected for checkout)
[STATE] Proceed to Checkout enabled
[MATH] Order Summary totals include all items
Cross_Layer_Checks:
[API] getCart returns all items with selectedForCheckout=true
[CONSOLE] no JS errors
[NETWORK] no 4xx/5xx
Failure_Signals: items not selected after merge; Proceed to Checkout disabled; items missing from merged cart

Title: Cart Merge Selection - Both Selected All (ON)
Preconditions: Default 'Selected for checkout' = ON; Cart1 (user) has items all selected; Cart2 (guest) has items all selected
Steps:
[NAV] log in to {{FRONT_URL}} and add items to cart (all selected)
[ACT] sign out
[NAV] add different items to cart as guest (all selected)
[ACT] sign in as {{USER_EMAIL}}
[NAV] navigate to {{FRONT_URL}}/cart
[ASSERT] verify items from both carts present
[ASSERT] verify all items remain selected for checkout
[ASSERT] verify Order Summary reflects all items
Assertions:
[STATE] items from both carts merged
[DOM] all items checked/selected for checkout
[MATH] Order Summary subtotal = sum of all merged items
[STATE] no items deselected after merge
Cross_Layer_Checks:
[API] getCart returns all items with selectedForCheckout=true
[CONSOLE] no JS errors
[NETWORK] no 4xx/5xx
Failure_Signals: some items deselected after merge; Order Summary only includes partial items; items missing

Title: Cart Merge Selection - Both Unselected All (ON)
Preconditions: Default 'Selected for checkout' = ON; Cart1 (user) has items all manually unselected; Cart2 (guest) has items all manually unselected
Steps:
[NAV] log in to {{FRONT_URL}} and add items to cart
[ACT] unselect all items in cart (uncheck checkboxes)
[ACT] sign out
[NAV] add items to cart as guest and unselect all
[ACT] sign in as {{USER_EMAIL}}
[NAV] navigate to {{FRONT_URL}}/cart
[ASSERT] verify items from both carts present
[ASSERT] verify selection state after merge (check if unselected state preserved or reset to default ON)
[ASSERT] verify Proceed to Checkout behavior with selection state
Assertions:
[STATE] items from both carts merged
[DOM] selection state consistent with merge logic (either all unselected preserved or reset to default ON)
[STATE] Order Summary totals reflect only selected items
[STATE] Proceed to Checkout button state matches selection
Cross_Layer_Checks:
[API] getCart returns items with correct selectedForCheckout values
[CONSOLE] no JS errors
[NETWORK] no 4xx/5xx
Failure_Signals: items missing after merge; selection state inconsistent; Order Summary incorrect

Title: Cart Merge Selection - Selected + Unselected (ON)
Preconditions: Default 'Selected for checkout' = ON; Cart1 (user) has all items selected; Cart2 (guest) has all items unselected
Steps:
[NAV] log in to {{FRONT_URL}} and add items to cart (keep selected)
[ACT] sign out
[NAV] add items to cart as guest then unselect all
[ACT] sign in as {{USER_EMAIL}}
[NAV] navigate to {{FRONT_URL}}/cart
[ASSERT] verify items from both carts present
[ASSERT] verify user cart items retain selected state
[ASSERT] verify guest cart items selection state after merge
[ASSERT] verify Order Summary reflects only selected items
Assertions:
[STATE] user cart items selected; guest items selection per merge rules
[MATH] Order Summary subtotal = sum of selected items only
[DOM] checkboxes reflect correct per-item selection state
[STATE] mixed selection state handled correctly
Cross_Layer_Checks:
[API] getCart returns correct per-item selectedForCheckout values
[CONSOLE] no JS errors
[NETWORK] no 4xx/5xx
Failure_Signals: all items forced to same selection state; Order Summary wrong; selection states swapped

Title: Cart Merge Selection - Mixed + Mixed (ON)
Preconditions: Default 'Selected for checkout' = ON; Cart1 (user) has mix of selected and unselected; Cart2 (guest) has mix of selected and unselected
Steps:
[NAV] log in to {{FRONT_URL}} and add 3+ items to cart
[ACT] unselect some items (create mixed state)
[ACT] sign out
[NAV] add 3+ items to cart as guest
[ACT] unselect some guest items (create mixed state)
[ACT] sign in as {{USER_EMAIL}}
[NAV] navigate to {{FRONT_URL}}/cart
[ASSERT] verify all items from both carts present
[ASSERT] verify per-item selection state after merge
[ASSERT] verify Order Summary reflects only selected items
Assertions:
[STATE] items from both carts merged with correct per-item selection
[MATH] Order Summary = sum of only selected items
[DOM] each item checkbox reflects its individual selection state
[STATE] no blanket select/deselect override on merge
Cross_Layer_Checks:
[API] getCart returns correct per-item selectedForCheckout values
[CONSOLE] no JS errors
[NETWORK] no 4xx/5xx
Failure_Signals: all items forced selected or deselected; per-item state lost; Order Summary miscalculated

Title: Cart Merge Selection - Empty + Unselected All (OFF)
Preconditions: Default 'Selected for checkout' = OFF; Cart1 (user) is empty; Cart2 (guest) has items all unselected
Steps:
[NAV] log in to {{FRONT_URL}} and ensure cart is empty
[ACT] sign out
[NAV] add items to cart as guest (default unselected per OFF setting)
[ACT] sign in as {{USER_EMAIL}}
[NAV] navigate to {{FRONT_URL}}/cart
[ASSERT] verify guest items present in merged cart
[ASSERT] verify items are unselected (per OFF default)
[ASSERT] verify Proceed to Checkout blocked or warns about no selected items
Assertions:
[STATE] guest items merged into user cart
[DOM] all items unchecked (unselected for checkout per OFF default)
[STATE] Proceed to Checkout disabled or shows warning
[MATH] Order Summary shows $0 or no items selected message
Cross_Layer_Checks:
[API] getCart returns items with selectedForCheckout=false
[CONSOLE] no JS errors
[NETWORK] no 4xx/5xx
Failure_Signals: items auto-selected despite OFF setting; Proceed to Checkout active with no selection

Title: Cart Merge Selection - Both Selected All (OFF)
Preconditions: Default 'Selected for checkout' = OFF; Cart1 (user) has items manually selected; Cart2 (guest) has items manually selected
Steps:
[NAV] log in to {{FRONT_URL}} and add items, manually select all
[ACT] sign out
[NAV] add items as guest, manually select all
[ACT] sign in as {{USER_EMAIL}}
[NAV] navigate to {{FRONT_URL}}/cart
[ASSERT] verify items from both carts present
[ASSERT] verify manually selected state preserved after merge
[ASSERT] verify Order Summary includes all items
Assertions:
[STATE] items from both carts merged
[DOM] all items checked (manually selected state preserved)
[MATH] Order Summary subtotal = sum of all items
[STATE] manual selection override of OFF default preserved
Cross_Layer_Checks:
[API] getCart returns items with selectedForCheckout=true
[CONSOLE] no JS errors
[NETWORK] no 4xx/5xx
Failure_Signals: manually selected items reset to unselected after merge; Order Summary empty despite selections

Title: Cart Merge Selection - Mixed + Mixed (OFF)
Preconditions: Default 'Selected for checkout' = OFF; Cart1 (user) has mix of selected/unselected; Cart2 (guest) has mix of selected/unselected
Steps:
[NAV] log in to {{FRONT_URL}} and add 3+ items
[ACT] manually select some, leave others unselected
[ACT] sign out
[NAV] add 3+ items as guest
[ACT] manually select some, leave others unselected
[ACT] sign in as {{USER_EMAIL}}
[NAV] navigate to {{FRONT_URL}}/cart
[ASSERT] verify all items from both carts present
[ASSERT] verify per-item selection state after merge
[ASSERT] verify Order Summary reflects only selected items
Assertions:
[STATE] all items merged with correct per-item selection
[MATH] Order Summary = sum of only selected items
[DOM] each item checkbox reflects individual state
[STATE] OFF default does not override manually selected items
Cross_Layer_Checks:
[API] getCart returns correct per-item selectedForCheckout values
[CONSOLE] no JS errors
[NETWORK] no 4xx/5xx
Failure_Signals: per-item selection lost; all forced to unselected; Order Summary wrong
